name: eval specs: each g-node-001..010 has a corresponding active eval spec at evals/specs/g-node-<id>-*.json
command: for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008 009 010; do ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/specs/" | grep -q "g-node-$i" || { echo "FAIL g-node-$i no eval spec" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
